title: Adjuvant mitotane in low-risk adrenocortical carcinoma: A reconstructed IPD analysis of the ADIUVO randomized and observational studies.
abstract: The benefit of adjuvant mitotane after complete resection of low-risk adrenocortical carcinoma (ACC) remains uncertain. The ADIUVO randomized trial was underpowered due to low event rates. We conducted a reconstructed individual patient data (IPD) analysis to provide a comprehensive reassessment of treatment effects.
